data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to confirm whether the waiting room feature is enabled by default, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to the waiting room setting. The linked use case mentions the therapist admitting the client from the waiting room, but it does not explicitly state that the waiting room is enabled by default. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: Waiting room enabled by default is not confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
